---
title: "Untitled Presentation"
subtitle: ""
author:
  - name: "Author Name"
    orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0000
    affiliations:
      - ref: inst1

affiliations:
  - id: inst1
    name: Institution Name
    department: Department Name

date: "today"
date-format: long

format:
  qbeamer-beamer: default
---

## First Slide

Content here.
